name: Patient 6
history: 28-year-old student recently returned from Egypt. First time managing bills and health insurance independently. Brother remains dependent on parents.
intermediate_belief: I can't handle adult responsibilities on my own.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'm failing at being an independent adult.
coping_strategies: Considering returning to parental support, seeking affordable counseling.
situation: Considering requesting financial help from parents. Looking for affordable counseling.
auto_thought: I can't make it on my own. I need to ask for help.
behavior: Research counseling options while contemplating asking parents for money.
